note: Advisory sandbox build. CO-4a is OFFLINE ONLY: a block-pattern lint engine + a dry-run REGULATORY_COPY_RISK report over a checked-in SYNTHETIC fixture. Proof is (1) data-driven discrimination (MSP/PSP self-claim lines flagged, clean lines not; mutating a clean line flips the flag) and (2) the repo language_gate dogfood (CHECK_OK on the real report, CHECK_REJECTED when an overclaim is injected). Never a bare governance PASS.
title: TrustField overclaim enforcement (OFFLINE ONLY) — block-pattern engine + dry-run REGULATORY_COPY_RISK lint report

scope.co4b_out_of_scope: live wiring (CO-4b) is out of scope and founder-gated

grounding: language_gate/language_gate_core_v1.py (OVERCLAIM_PATTERNS imported verbatim; public-surface block_private -> private_only)
subject.note: engine loads CONFLICT_PHRASE literals from the overlay + a REGULATORY_COPY_RISK regex bank (MSP_SELF_ID / PSP_SELF_CLAIM / ENTITY_ALIAS) + OVERCLAIM_PATTERNS + block_private posture. Sources read-only.

what_it_proves: block-pattern engine flags only FIRST-PARTY MSP/PSP self-claims and entity-alias/overclaim copy; the 5 risky fixture lines are flagged and the 4 clean lines are not
red-capable (data-driven): mutating a clean fixture line into an MSP/PSP self-claim flips its flagged status under the SAME engine
red-capable (dogfood): the REAL rendered report does NOT FAIL the language_gate (public) -> CHECK_OK; a minimal mutation injecting '100% guaranteed' FAILs the same gate -> CHECK_REJECTED (OVERCLAIM)
minimality: reversing the single injection reproduces the clean artifact byte-for-byte (same gate, opposite verdicts)
offending spans are REDACTED in the report ([flagged: <subclass>]) so no raw overclaim string is reproduced; the report authors NO RPAA/FINTRAC/MSB/MSP/PSP status assertion
Lock 10: HTML written only to local out/, carries the DO-NOT-PUSH banner + the lint banner 'lint result, not a legal/compliance determination; publishing is founder-gated'
EMPTY-SINK guard: an empty fixture renders UNPOPULATED badges, never 0/blank as all-clear; computed counts are watermarked 'SYNTHETIC — not a guaranteed claim'
the dogfood uses scan/decide in-process, writing NO receipt into the tracked language_gate/receipts dir
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (overlay + language_gate read-only; all writes confined to catalog/builds/CO-4a)
Lock 10 commercial (generated HTML to local out/ only, visible DO-NOT-PUSH + lint banner, redacted evidence, synthetic watermark, no status/outcome claim)
no live call (no network/CF/Supabase/sends; no live TrustField repo or trustfield.ca access; gate run in-process with no receipt write)
worktree not pushed; no git write commands

results.raw_trigger_leak_check: none of the 6 raw overclaim strings appear in the rendered HTML (all redacted)
results.red_run_canary: FIRED (asserting CHECK_OK on the overclaim mutant raised AssertionError, exit 1)
results.pollution_outside_build_dir: none (git status tracked changes outside CO-4a == 0)

exit_gate_B4: CO-4a done — offline block-pattern lint engine flags MSP/PSP self-claims + overclaims over a synthetic fixture, redacts the evidence, dogfoods clean through the language_gate, and rejects an injected overclaim by minimal mutation.
next_action: CO-4b (founder-gated): live wiring against real web copy is OUT OF SCOPE for this build.
